questionHtml: Outline what is meant by the niche concept.
markschemeHtml:
a. the role of an organism in its environment
OR
functional position of an organism in its environment ✔

b. includes «spatial» habitat AND feeding activities AND interactions with other species in the community ✔ All required.

c. no two species can occupy the same niche ✔

d. a niche can be fundamental or realized ✔ OWTTE

meta.title: Outline what is meant by the niche concept.
breadcrumbLabels: B4.2.1. Ecological niche as the role of a species in an ecosystem
